name: Snails, Cretan Style, w/ Vinegar or Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: Olive oil (½ cup per 1 lb of snails)
Red wine vinegar (¼ cup per 1 lb of snails)
Peeled, chopped tomatoes (1 lb per 1 lb of snails)
Grated onion (¼ cup per 1 lb of snails)
Chopped fresh parsley (¼ cup per 1 lb of snails)
recipeInstructions:
To prepare snails:
1. Clean the snails thoroughly in cold water and place them in a container.
2. Cover with hot water, add salt (1 teaspoon per quart), and bring to a boil.
3. Continue boiling for 20 minutes, skimming foam, then drain.
For Snails Braised with Tomatoes:
4. Heat olive oil in a deep pan until nearly boiling (½ cup per pound of snails).
5. Add snails and fry for 10 minutes, turning carefully with tongs to avoid spattering.
6. Pour in red wine vinegar (¼ cup per pound of snails), return to heat, and stir.
7. Remove from heat and add grated onion, parsley, and chopped tomatoes (1 lb per pound of snails).
8. Return to heat and simmer for 30 minutes until tomatoes are tender.
9. Serve hot with remaining sauce, bread, and wine.
For Snails Braised with Tomatoes:
10. In a deep pan, heat olive oil (½ cup per pound of snails), add salt and snails.
11. Cover, lower heat, and cook for 10 minutes, turning once.
12. Add grated onion and chopped parsley (¼ cup per pound of snails).
13. Stir over medium heat until tomatoes are tender.
14. Serve with fried potatoes and a baby zucchini salad.
